_note: File cau hinh mo ta thuat toan/tham so dung trong demo E2EE. KHONG chua secret/khoa that.

encryption.key_scope: chi Device va App giu khoa, Cloud khong duoc cap khoa nay

transport.protocol_suggestion: MQTT hoac HTTPS (TLS 1.2+) cho tang van chuyen
transport.note: TLS bao ve duong truyen; AES-256-GCM o tren la lop E2EE bo sung, doc lap voi TLS
